name: Ashen Hollow
specialty: A team of shadowy infiltrators known for their exceptional stealth and adaptability, capable of navigating the treacherous rifts of the Undercity with unparalleled precision.

members.name: Eira Thornwhisper
members.note: Once a Tower Authority enforcer, she was betrayed and now seeks vengeance against her former colleagues

members.name: Rhys Shadowstitch
members.note: His uncanny ability to trail any target across the Undercity's labyrinthine paths is legendary

members.name: Thorgrim Icefist
members.note: A former gladiator, his imposing presence and combat prowess strike fear in those who cross his path

members.name: Zara Flameheart
members.note: Her charm and wit have earned her a reputation as the most persuasive negotiator in the Undercity's shadows

visual: Clad in black leather armor, the group moves with purpose, their faces obscured by dark fabric masks. They carry a collection of deadly blades and a single, ominous banner bearing the symbol of the Argent Blades emblazoned upon it.
reputation_note: Whispers spread throughout the Undercity of a cursed banner and four individuals who will stop at nothing to see their enemies fall
